name: Taint Shared Content
description: Detects modification of files on network shares to deliver malicious content
query:
// Detect suspicious file writes to network shares
// Trigger on executable/script writes to SMB shares
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)(\\\\.*\\.*\.(exe|dll|bat|cmd|vbs|js|hta|lnk|scr)$)"
group by hostname, user
having count(*) > 2
within 300 seconds
